hero.description: Final-year Computer Science student at HKU. Building scalable Spring Boot backends, React frontends, and end-to-end ML pipelines. Passionate about clean, impactful engineering that ships.

whatIBuild.title: What I Build
whatIBuild.content: I'm a final-year Computer Science student at HKU specializing in scalable Spring Boot backends, React frontends, and ML model deployment. I've shipped production-ready features serving South Asian eHealth communities and built end-to-end OCR pipelines processing thousands of receipts weekly.

howIThink.title: How I Think
howIThink.content: I approach engineering as a craft — building things that work, shipping fast, and iterating with purpose. Every project is an opportunity to learn deeper fundamentals and deliver real value. I believe production code that serves real users teaches more than theory ever can.

philosophy.title: Engineering Philosophy
items: Ship production code that serves real users
Build end-to-end — own the full stack
Optimize for iteration speed without cutting corners
Learn by building, not just reading

interests.title: Scalable Architecture
interests.description: Designing systems that grow efficiently with demand and complexity.

interests.title: AI Systems
interests.description: Building intelligent systems that leverage machine learning at scale.

interests.title: High Performance
interests.description: Optimizing systems for speed, efficiency, and reliability.

interests.title: Data Technologies
interests.description: Working with large-scale data processing and real-time analytics.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of projects showcasing my approach to building scalable, high-performance systems.

spendify.title: Spendify – Personal Finance Tracker
spendify.description: Spring Boot RESTful API with OCR receipt processing and CI/CD pipeline
spendify.longDescription: Architected a Spring Boot RESTful API backend with layered architecture (Controller/Service/Repository) and CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions deploying to production on every merge to main. Implemented 7+ RESTful endpoints with JWT-based authentication and Microsoft SQL Server for secure financial data storage.
spendify.impact: OCR pipeline reduces manual expense entry time by 80% for active beta users

money-detector.title: Money Detector
money-detector.description: On-device Android banknote denomination classifier using TensorFlow Lite
money-detector.longDescription: Built an Android banknote denomination classifier in Java using TensorFlow Lite, processing images directly on-device with no server dependency. Trained a CNN model via Teachable Machine on 500+ banknote images across 8 denomination classes, achieving 70% accuracy on variable-quality captures.
money-detector.impact: 70% accuracy on variable-quality captures, outperforming naive baseline by 30pp

pose-monitor.title: Pose-Monitor
pose-monitor.description: Real-time plank pose monitoring web app with MoveNet pose estimation
pose-monitor.longDescription: Led a 4-person team to build a real-time plank pose monitoring web app in Python and Streamlit with pre-trained MoveNet Lightning pose estimation. Trained a TensorFlow custom classifier on joint position data to distinguish standard plank poses from incorrect form, deployed with 80% classification accuracy and 200ms average inference latency.
pose-monitor.impact: 80% pose classification accuracy with 200ms inference latency for real-time feedback

portalvision-intern.title: Software Engineer Intern
portalvision-intern.description: Built and shipped production-ready features for South Asian eHealth communities. Delivered multilingual UI/UX and full-stack backend integrations on weekly sprints.
highlights: Built multilingual i18n module for React.js eHealth app serving South Asian communities; shipped UI/UX in 4 languages (English, Hindi, Urdu, Nepali)
Developed full-stack Spring Boot backend for iSocial non-profit management system, integrating SQL database and Jaspersoft reporting to serve NGO caseworkers
Owned end-to-end feature delivery across React.js frontend and Spring Boot backend; resolved client-reported bugs and shipped UX improvements on weekly sprints

hku-beng.description: Final-year Computer Science student building strong foundations in algorithms, data structures, and software engineering principles.
highlights: Specializing in scalable backends, React frontends, and ML model deployment
Building production-grade projects with Spring Boot, React, and TensorFlow
